{{CargoOrgan
|name=Eye of Clarity
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10697
|idx=55
|description=Sees through all illusions, reveals every truth. With this gaze, no deception can endure, and the laws of the world lie within your grasp.
|skill=Before round start, perceive divine power, causing the next attack to deal DMG equal to 220% of ATK!
|hp=2190
|def=363
|atk=249
|rush=239
|gene1=In Civilization Mirage, Water DMG +240
|gene2=In Civilization Mirage, Earth DMG +240
|gene3=In Civilization Mirage, Wind DMG +240
|gene4=In Civilization Mirage, ignore enemy DEF +4%
|gene5=In Civilization Mirage, Round 1 DMG to enemy +20%
|gene6=In Civilization Mirages, DMG +12%
|gene7=In Civilization Mirage, ignore enemy DEF +4% (Awakened)
|}}
